headline: Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE:A) Surges 6% on Q2 Earnings Beat
summary: Agilent Technologies beat Q2 2026 estimates with EPS of $1.49 and 10% revenue growth, sending stock up 6% in after-hours trading amid strong segment performance.

raw.headline: Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE:A) Surges 6% on Q2 Earnings Beat

headline: Agilent (NYSE:A) Surprises With Q1 CY2026 Sales, Stock Soars
summary: Life sciences tools company Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 10% year on year to $1.84 billion. The company expects next quarter’s revenue to be around $1.84 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.49 per share was 5.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Agilent Reports Second-Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., May 27, 2026--Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) today reported revenue of $1.83 billion for the second quarter ended April 30, 2026, representing growth of 10.0% reported and up 6.3% core(1) compared with the second quarter of 2025.
